title: Theresa Jeyi new Chief Whip of Council
description: GEORGE NEWS - The DA's Theresa Jeyi was...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The DA's Theresa Jeyi was elected as the new Chief Whip of Council, following the resignation of DA's Marlene Barnard who previously served in the position.


> Jerome Petersen of the PBI was nominated by Samuel Vorster of the PA. Jeyi won with 31 votes against 19 for Petersen.


Jeyi is known as a live wire who speaks her mind in Council.


> The New Mayco


- Donovan Gultig - Electrical Engineering
- Browen Johnson - Civil Engineering
- Marchell Kleynhans - Community Services
- Melvin Roelfse - Social Development
- Brendon Adams - Community Safety
- Marlene Barnardt - Planning, Development, Tourism
- Jean Saffers - Human Settlements
- Marais Kruger - Financial Services
- Nonnie Mbete - Human Resource Services
- The position for Corporate Services remain open for now.

Representatives for the Garden Route District Council are as follows: Iona Kritzinger, Stag Cronjé and Monique Simmers. They replace Gert van Niekerk, Justin Fry and Donovan Gultig.

Marlene Barnardt resigned as Chief Whip of Council.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
